articles.title: Budi95: Ceiling limit for e-hailing, gig workers retained, says Anwar
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: The ceiling limit for subsidised RON95 petrol at RM1.99 per litre for e-hailing and gig workers under Budi95 will be retained at 800 litres per month, says Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim. Rea

articles.title: Iran allowing Malaysian vessels to pass Hormuz Strait, says Anwar
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim says Malaysian vessels are now allowed to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, following talks with leaders of Iran, Egypt, Turkey and other regional countries. Re

articles.title: Budi95 quota temporarily adjusted to 200 litres per month, maintained at RM1.99, says Anwar
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: The quota for subsidised RON95 petrol under Budi95 will be adjusted to 200 litres per month beginning April 1, says Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim. Read full story

articles.title: Agri Ministry to maintain input subsidies as usual despite West Asia unrest
articles.summary: PUTRAJAYA: Input subsidies for seeds, fertilisers, and pesticides will continue as usual, despite rising global fertiliser costs amid ongoing unrest in West Asia. Read full story

articles.title: Missing Survey Dept officer found dead at Malaysia-Brunei border
articles.summary: PUTRAJAYA: The missing Survey and Mapping Department officer has been found dead at the Malaysia-Brunei border. Read full story

articles.title: Be responsible, keep public facilities clean, says Onn Hafiz on Johor water park closure
articles.summary: JOHOR BARU: The public must take greater responsibility in caring for public facilities, says Johor Mentri Besar Datuk Onn Hafiz Ghazi, following irresponsible acts that prompted the temporary closure
